title: The Past.
content:
The past is such a curious creature,
    To look her in the face
    A transport may reward us,
    Or a disgrace.

    Unarmed if any meet her,
    I charge him, fly!
    Her rusty ammunition
    Might yet reply!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "The Past."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
